title: A Carpenter Who
storyParagraphs: From building outdoor gyms during lockdown to creating apps that help carpenters work smarter — my journey has always been about combining hands-on craft with digital innovation.
I've spent years honing my carpentry skills across kitchens, bespoke furniture, and structural builds. Along the way, I discovered SketchUp and it transformed how I plan and present work to clients.
storyClosingLead: That same drive to work smarter led me to build
storyClosingRest: — an app that automates the tedious calculations every cabinet maker deals with daily. Parts lists, cut lists, board optimisation — done in seconds instead of hours.

differentiators.title: I design before I build
differentiators.description: Every project starts in SketchUp. You see a 3D model before I pick up a saw.

differentiators.title: I build tools for builders
differentiators.description: Cabinetos was born from my own frustrations with manual calculations. It solves real problems.

differentiators.title: I share what I learn
differentiators.description: Through my blog, social media, and tutorials — I help other carpenters level up their workflow.
